name: Back 9 Social
about: Back 9 Social is a golf simulator venue combining premium technology with a gastropub and bar atmosphere. They utilize 10 TrackMan 4 launch monitors with Virtual Golf 3 simulation software, offering access to over 120 world-class courses and a variety of practice tools and games. Pricing is on a per-bay, hourly basis, accommodating groups of up to 8 players, with advance reservations recommended. The venue is designed to appeal to both serious golfers and social groups, providing an environment for practice, play, and events with a focus on hospitality.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan 4 launch monitors provide highly accurate data for all shot types
Variety of games and global tournament options add competitive and social elements
Combines top-tier golf simulation with high-quality food and craft cocktails

food_and_drink.notes: Gastropub eats available for order in-bay or from the kitchen, featuring items like Beef Barbacoa and Philly Cheese Steak.
Craft cocktails available, including the Barrel Aged Manhattan.

simulator_hardware.notes: 10 simulators equipped with TrackMan 4 launch monitors, featuring Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (OERT) technology.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The FAQ does not explicitly state whether they provide club rentals, but it is standard for such facilities. It is best to contact them directly for confirmation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, bringing outside food and drink is not permitted. The venue has a full kitchen and bar with a gastropub menu and craft cocktails available for order.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes about one hour per person to play a round of 18 holes. For a group of four, plan for approximately four hours to complete a round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention kid-friendly features or policies. It is recommended to contact them directly to inquire about suitability for children.
